violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Chinese Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The hand-washing sink outside the toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a large trash can. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the basement. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelf above the 3 bay sink have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
